---
name: Preset request
about: Suggest a new preset or a change to an existing one
title: "[PRESET] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Preset name

New preset, or which existing preset (Study / Research / Writing / Project
Management / Creative / Business-Admin / Personal Assistant) this request
changes.

## Who is this for

Describe the target user and their goal, similar to the "Who is this for"
entries in the README.

## Skills needed

Which skills from the unified `skills/` pool would this preset's `core_skills`
and `optional_skills` draw from? If a skill doesn't exist yet, describe what
it should do — see `templates/skill-template/` for the 9-section format a new
skill needs.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps scope this — example workflows, comparable presets,
or links to `curated-skills-registry.md` rows this would reuse.
